---
# Renders the margin-geometry example shown in the chapter. The format
# block mirrors _margin-geometry.yml (the config-only partial the chapter
# displays); this file adds the body content. Uses all three column
# classes: .column-body (regular text), .column-page, .column-margin.
#
# The "screenshot: full-page" marker tells screenshot-examples.sh to keep
# the whole page (skip its -trim) so the page margins stay visible.
# screenshot: full-page
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.75in
      bottom: 0.75in
    margin-geometry:
      inner:
        far: 1in
        width: 0in
        separation: 0.25in
      outer:
        far: 1in
        width: 1.5in
        separation: 0.25in
    page-numbering: ""
---

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

::: {.column-margin}
A `.column-margin` note sits in the 1.5-inch outer margin column.
:::

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

::: {.column-page}
{{< lipsum 1 >}}
:::

{{< lipsum 1 >}}
